g.text: Workflow Architecture · Build → Execute → Govern → Improve
Every agent you build feeds learnings back into the framework. The system compounds.
learnings feed back into a better forge
autoimprove scoring, OpenSpace fixes, trust progression, assessment rubric
New patterns, new anti-patterns, better scoring weights, sharper test cases
Gathers, verifies, structures info. Confidence-scored. Never recommends.
Pressure-tests decisions. Identifies non-obvious risks. Challenges reasoning.
Routes work. Maintains accountability. Nothing falls through the cracks.
Understand deeply → Pressure-test → Sequence → Prepare → Do → Prove → Extract
Every state modification logged. JSONL format.
No deleting | No messages | No financial
No credentials | No force ops | No self-modify
Git Ratchet: commit on improve, reset on regress.
Repair broken agent. Triggered by failures.
Extract novel pattern as new agent.
